nodes.context: Elite military unit of the Assad regime involved in drug production and smuggling.
Lebanese militant group participating in drug production and smuggling networks in Syria.
Lebanese criminal network led by drug kingpin Hassan Daqou, collaborating with the Fourth Armoured Division.

edges.context: Hassan Daqou collaborated with the Fourth Armoured Division to traffic drugs.
Hezbollah participated in drug production and smuggling networks alongside the Fourth Armoured Division.
